projectDescription: AhaSlides is an interactive presentation platform that lets presenters run live polls, quizzes, word clouds, and Q&A so audiences can engage in real time from any device.
keyFeatures: Live polls with real-time bar, pie, and donut chart results
Scored quizzes with leaderboard (Pick Answer, Type Answer, Match Pairs, Correct Order, Categorise)
Word Cloud slides with Smart Grouping and up to 5,000 submissions
Q&A slide and always-on question board for audience questions
Spinner Wheel for random participant selection
Brainstorm, Rating Scale, Ranking, Pin on Image, Idea Board, Diagram slide types
PowerPoint and PDF import with optional AI interactive layer
Real-time collaboration with Editor and Presenter roles
Self-paced mode, custom access codes, QR code sharing
Presentation reports with per-participant response breakdowns and Excel export
Custom branding with logo and 250 font options (Pro/Enterprise)
Microsoft Teams add-in, Zoom Marketplace app, Google Slides embed, website iFrame embed
Team workspaces with Owner, Admin, and Member roles
Free plan — no credit card, no expiry, up to 50 live participants
publicApiSurface: iFrame embed snippet using audience link
Google Slides: publish-to-web link embedded as a slide type
Microsoft Teams add-in (Zoom Marketplace and Teams App Store)
Excel export via Results tab → Request Excel file
